## Summary

Describe the proposed feature.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the expected behavior or solution.

## Scope

- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Pipeline behavior
- [ ] Spec / validation rules
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or implementation notes if helpful.
